text.title: Solo Burnout Tripwires Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable tripwire signals to a rule from 01-core-rules.xml for solo-burnout-tripwires.

decision-tree.root-question: Did all six tripwires measure within healthy thresholds this week?

conclusion.verdict: BLOCK — block new feature work, take recovery week
BLOCK — book-health-appointment before next feature commit
skip — preconditions in Applies-If not met

text.example: Week 2026-W21: sleep 6h52m + 1 weekend day in 4w + slope +0.04 + 2 joy entries + 1 health deferral + 2 contacts → all green → continue.
